UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Gloria Bravo is present.
Attorney Daniel Cheung appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Griselia Flores and Henry Flores is present.
Attorney Aaron Farmer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAR-12-2012 is vacated.
